title: Vanilla Emissives
body:
This resource pack makes several textures have a partial glow, and works in Vanilla Minecraft without any mods. It does not use core shaders, so is compatible with Sodium and Iris.

![Emissive Creaking Hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FsDvJaGe/images/184694ca15efac78691cb3c5128905eff0950977.png)

![Emissive Redstone Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FsDvJaGe/images/0d98c4bb0d7081c851b93932f320b0396fe0ab67.png)

![Emissive Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FsDvJaGe/images/bcd997a3a6e10355bb269da6b16658f6eee1008b.png)
